---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## To reproduce

Steps (or a minimal code/CLI snippet) that triggers the problem:

```python
# ...
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened (include the full error/traceback if any).

## Environment

- BattINFO version: <!-- `battinfo --version` or pip show battinfo -->
- Python version:
- OS:

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — sample records, schema, screenshots.
